rationale: checkPackageJSONLocations scans the three required dirs (/, website/, cli/internal/server/frontend/), reports node_modules missing or stale-vs-bun.lock with a `bun install` remediation, and is wired into runDoctor with unit tests covering branches.

findings.summary: Comment renumbers the legacy-symlinks check to 'Check 13' but no Check 12 exists; cosmetic.
Implementation is ~210 LoC (incl. tests) vs. ~100 LoC estimate in the bead; size is justified by the test coverage.
Optional `ddx init` summary mention of discovered package.json files was not added; the bead marks this as optional.
